targets.rawSql:
SELECT countDistinct(strategy_id) AS `Stratégies activées`
FROM
(
  SELECT strategy_id, argMax(enabled, observed_at) AS enabled
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
WHERE enabled

SELECT countDistinct(strategy_id) AS `Stratégies en paper`
FROM
(
  SELECT strategy_id, argMax(mode, observed_at) AS configured_mode
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
WHERE configured_mode = 'paper_only'

SELECT countDistinct(strategy_id) AS `Stratégies live autorisées`
FROM
(
  SELECT strategy_id, argMax(allow_live, observed_at) AS allow_live, argMax(mode, observed_at) AS configured_mode
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
WHERE allow_live OR configured_mode = 'live_allowed'

WITH health AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS age_minutes, countIf(blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '' OR NOT risk_ok OR NOT source_ok OR NOT orderbook_ok) AS blockers
  FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
SELECT count() AS `Actions prioritaires`
FROM health
WHERE age_minutes > 60 OR blockers > 0

WITH configs AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, argMax(enabled, observed_at) AS enabled, argMax(mode, observed_at) AS configured_mode, argMax(allow_live, observed_at) AS allow_live, max(observed_at) AS config_observed_at
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs
  WHERE match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), decisions AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, max(observed_at) AS last_decision_at, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS age_minutes, count() AS decisions, countIf(blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '' OR NOT risk_ok OR NOT source_ok OR NOT orderbook_ok) AS blockers, avg(risk_ok) AS risk_ok_rate, avg(source_ok) AS source_ok_rate, avg(orderbook_ok) AS orderbook_ok_rate
  FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), signals AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, count() AS signals, max(live_order_allowed OR mode = 'live') AS live_seen
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_signals
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
SELECT
  configs.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  if(configs.enabled, 'Activée', 'Désactivée') AS `État configuré`,
  configs.configured_mode AS `Mode configuré`,
  if(configs.allow_live, 'Oui', 'Non') AS `Live autorisé`,
  ifNull(signals.signals, 0) AS `Signaux`,
  ifNull(decisions.decisions, 0) AS `Décisions`,
  ifNull(decisions.blockers, 0) AS `Blocages`,
  if(isNull(decisions.last_decision_at), '', formatDateTime(toTimeZone(decisions.last_decision_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S')) AS `Dernière décision (Paris)`,
  ifNull(decisions.age_minutes, 999999) AS `Âge minutes`,
  multiIf(NOT configs.enabled, 'Vérifier si elle doit rester désactivée', isNull(decisions.last_decision_at), 'Alimenter les données / vérifier le runtime', decisions.age_minutes > 60, 'Relancer ou diagnostiquer les données obsolètes', ifNull(decisions.risk_ok_rate, 1) < 0.8, 'Corriger les règles risque', ifNull(decisions.source_ok_rate, 1) < 0.8, 'Corriger la source météo', ifNull(decisions.orderbook_ok_rate, 1) < 0.8, 'Corriger le carnet / liquidité', ifNull(decisions.blockers, 0) > 0, 'Lire les raisons de blocage', configs.configured_mode = 'live_allowed' AND NOT configs.allow_live, 'Live incohérent : guardrail à vérifier', ifNull(signals.signals, 0) > 0 AND configs.configured_mode = 'paper_only', 'Candidate à revue paper', 'Rien à faire') AS `Action recommandée`,
  concat('/strategies/config/', configs.strategy_id) AS `Configurer stratégie`
FROM configs
LEFT JOIN decisions ON configs.strategy_id = decisions.strategy_id
LEFT JOIN signals ON configs.strategy_id = signals.strategy_id
ORDER BY `Action recommandée`, `Âge minutes` DESC

WITH metrics AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, sum(trade_count) AS trades, sum(skip_count) AS skips, sum(decision_count) AS decisions, sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS skip_rate, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS net_pnl_usdc, avg(roi) AS roi
  FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), health AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, countIf(blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '' OR NOT risk_ok OR NOT source_ok OR NOT orderbook_ok) AS blockers, avg(risk_ok) AS risk_ok_rate, avg(source_ok) AS source_ok_rate, avg(orderbook_ok) AS orderbook_ok_rate
  FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), configs AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, argMax(enabled, observed_at) AS enabled, argMax(mode, observed_at) AS configured_mode, argMax(allow_live, observed_at) AS allow_live
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
SELECT
  metrics.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  ifNull(configs.configured_mode, 'non_configurée') AS `Mode configuré`,
  metrics.trades AS `Trades`,
  metrics.skip_rate AS `Taux de skip`,
  metrics.net_pnl_usdc AS `PnL net`,
  metrics.roi AS `ROI`,
  ifNull(health.blockers, 0) AS `Blocages`,
  multiIf(NOT ifNull(configs.enabled, 0), 'Désactivée', ifNull(health.blockers, 0) > 0, 'Pas prête : blocages', metrics.trades = 0, 'Pas assez de trades paper', metrics.skip_rate > 0.8, 'Trop de skips', metrics.net_pnl_usdc >= 0 AND metrics.roi >= 0, 'Candidate live à examiner', 'Continuer paper') AS `Avis`
FROM metrics
LEFT JOIN health ON metrics.strategy_id = health.strategy_id
LEFT JOIN configs ON metrics.strategy_id = configs.strategy_id
ORDER BY `Avis`, `PnL net` DESC

WITH metrics AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, sum(decision_count) AS decisions, sum(skip_count) AS skips, sum(skip_count) / nullIf(sum(decision_count), 0) AS skip_rate, sum(net_pnl_usdc) AS net_pnl_usdc, avg(roi) AS roi, dateDiff('minute', max(observed_at), now()) AS age_minutes
  FROM prediction_core.profile_metrics
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), blockers AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, countIf(blocker != '' OR skip_reason != '') AS blockers
  FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
SELECT
  metrics.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  metrics.age_minutes AS `Âge minutes`,
  metrics.decisions AS `Décisions`,
  metrics.skip_rate AS `Taux de skip`,
  metrics.net_pnl_usdc AS `PnL net`,
  metrics.roi AS `ROI`,
  ifNull(blockers.blockers, 0) AS `Blocages`,
  multiIf(metrics.age_minutes > 60, 'Données obsolètes', ifNull(blockers.blockers, 0) > 0, 'Blocages fréquents', metrics.decisions > 0 AND metrics.skip_rate > 0.9, 'Trop de skips', metrics.net_pnl_usdc < 0 AND metrics.roi < 0, 'Performance négative', 'Surveillance normale') AS `Raison`
FROM metrics
LEFT JOIN blockers ON metrics.strategy_id = blockers.strategy_id
WHERE metrics.age_minutes > 60 OR ifNull(blockers.blockers, 0) > 0 OR metrics.skip_rate > 0.9 OR (metrics.net_pnl_usdc < 0 AND metrics.roi < 0)
ORDER BY `Raison`, `Âge minutes` DESC

WITH configs AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, argMax(enabled, observed_at) AS enabled, argMax(mode, observed_at) AS configured_mode, argMax(allow_live, observed_at) AS allow_live, argMax(settings, observed_at) AS settings
  FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs
  WHERE match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
), activity AS
(
  SELECT strategy_id, max(live_order_allowed OR mode = 'live') AS live_seen, countIf(mode = 'paper' OR mode = 'paper_only') AS paper_events, count() AS events, max(observed_at) AS last_event_at
  FROM prediction_core.execution_events
  WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
    AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  GROUP BY strategy_id
)
SELECT
  configs.strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  if(configs.enabled, 'Activée', 'Désactivée') AS `État configuré`,
  configs.configured_mode AS `Mode configuré`,
  if(configs.allow_live, 'Oui', 'Non') AS `Live autorisé config`,
  ifNull(activity.live_seen, 0) AS `Live vu`,
  ifNull(activity.paper_events, 0) AS `Événements paper`,
  if(isNull(activity.last_event_at), '', formatDateTime(toTimeZone(activity.last_event_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S')) AS `Dernier événement (Paris)`,
  multiIf(configs.configured_mode = 'live_allowed' AND NOT configs.allow_live, 'Config live incohérente', NOT configs.enabled AND ifNull(activity.events, 0) > 0, 'Activité alors que désactivée', configs.allow_live AND ifNull(activity.live_seen, 0) = 0, 'Live autorisé mais jamais vu', configs.configured_mode = 'paper_only' AND ifNull(activity.live_seen, 0), 'Live vu malgré paper', 'Cohérent') AS `Diagnostic`,
  configs.settings AS `Paramètres`
FROM configs
LEFT JOIN activity ON configs.strategy_id = activity.strategy_id
ORDER BY `Diagnostic`, `Stratégie`

SELECT
  formatDateTime(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris'), '%d/%m/%Y %H:%i:%S') AS `Observation (Paris)`,
  strategy_id AS `Stratégie`,
  profile_id AS `Profil`,
  market_id AS `Marché`,
  mode AS `Mode`,
  decision_status AS `Décision`,
  edge AS `Edge`,
  limit_price AS `Prix limite`,
  skip_reason AS `Raison de skip`,
  blocker AS `Blocage`,
  risk_ok AS `Risque OK`,
  source_ok AS `Source OK`,
  orderbook_ok AS `Carnet OK`
FROM prediction_core.debug_decisions
WHERE $__timeFilter(observed_at)
  AND match(strategy_id, '${strategy:regex}')
  AND match(profile_id, '${profile:regex}')
  AND match(market_id, '${market:regex}')
  AND match(mode, '${mode:regex}')
  AND (
    '${business_time}' = 'all'
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'business_hours' AND toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22)
    OR ('${business_time}' = 'off_hours' AND NOT (toHour(toTimeZone(observed_at, 'Europe/Paris')) BETWEEN 14 AND 22))
  )
ORDER BY observed_at DESC
LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT strategy_id FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs ORDER BY strategy_id
list.label: Stratégie
list.name: strategy
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT strategy_id FROM prediction_core.strategy_configs ORDER BY strategy_id
